items.title: VISIONARY FOUNDER
items.name: Er. Alok Ranjan Mallick
items.subtitle: Chairman, Ayush Group
items.quote: Bhubaneswar Engineering College (BEC) is more than just an academic institution — it is a launchpad for visionaries who will shape the future of our nation.

items.title: ACADEMICS & ADMINISTRATION
items.name: Prof. Dr. B.N. Biswal
items.subtitle: Director, BEC Bhubaneswar
items.quote: At the end of your journey with BEC, we are certain that you will turn out to be a confident technocrat and stay blessed in all sphere of life.
